EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Datastore "{object.name}" is created on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Datastore "{object.name}" is renamed on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Datastore "{object.name}" is removed from ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Datastore "{object.name}" is removed from an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Datastore "{object.name}" from ESXi host {datafield6} is discovered on vCenter host {event_src.host}
